transactions.desc: The Chicago Cubs traded INF Cole Mathis to the New York Mets.
The New York Mets traded LHP David Peterson to the Chicago Cubs.
The Nationals optioned Palmquist to Triple-A Rochester following Wednesday's game against the Phillies.
The Giants optioned Beck to Triple-A Sacramento on Wednesday, Justice delos Santos of The San Jose Mercury News reports.
The Giants  reinstated Mahle (hamstring) from the 15-day injured list to start Wednesday's game against the Athletics.
The Mets reinstated Mauricio (thumb) from the 10-day injured list Wednesday and optioned him to Triple-A Syracuse, Andrew Tredinnick of The Bergen Record reports.
The Mets designated Short for assignment on Wednesday, Andrew Tredinnick of The Bergen Record reports.
The Cubs designated Roa for assignment Wednesday, Meghan Montemurro of the Chicago Tribune reports.
The Cubs claimed Wilson off waivers from the Phillies on Wednesday, Meghan Montemurro of the Chicago Tribune reports.
The Astros recalled Gordon from Triple-A Sugar Land on Wednesday.
The Astros optioned VanWey to Triple-A Sugar Land on Wednesday.
The Mets reinstated Lindor (calf) from the 10-day injured list ahead of the second game of Wednesday's doubleheader with the Cubs. He'll start at shortstop and bat second.
The Nationals designated Lara for assignment Wednesday.
The Nationals claimed Lawrence off waivers from the Twins on Wednesday.
The Diamondbacks optioned Drake to Triple-A Reno on Wednesday.
The Diamondbacks recalled Bratt from Triple-A Reno on Wednesday.
The Diamondbacks reinstated Santana (adductor) from the 60-day injured list Wednesday and designated him for assignment.
The Angels recalled Lowe from Triple-A Salt Lake on Wednesday. He'll start in center field and bat eighth in the Angels' series finale with the Orioles.
Atlanta selected Hamilton's contract from Triple-A Gwinnett on Wednesday.
Atlanta designated Carrasco for assignment Wednesday.
Atlanta optioned Ritchie to Triple-A Gwinnett on Wednesday.
Atlanta activated Kinley (elbow) from the 15-day injured list Wednesday.
The Rockies recalled Halvorsen from Triple-A Albuquerque on Wednesday.
The Nationals recalled Palmquist from Triple-A Rochester, and he'll serve as the team's opening pitcher for Wednesday's game against the Phillies, Mark Zuckerman of NatsJournal.com reports.
The Cubs designated Nunez for assignment Wednesday.
The Cubs recalled Hollowell from Triple-A Iowa on Wednesday.
The Yankees recalled Cabrera from Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Wednesday.
The Twins recalled Funderburk from Triple-A St. Paul on Wednesday.
The Twins recalled Raya from Triple-A St. Paul on Wednesday.
The Twins optioned Rojas to Triple-A St. Paul on Wednesday.
